name: Caesar Salad Dressing (Whistler's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dressing ingredients except olive oil in a blender using low speed.
2. Maintain the speed and add olive oil very slowly until the mixture thickens and is the consistency of mayonnaise.
3. Add vinegar and blend.
4. Spoon into a glass jar, cover, and refrigerate up to a week, using as needed.
5. For Caesar Salad, tear romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
6. Toss with dressing then add freshly grated Parmesan cheese, croutons, and fried bacon bits to taste.
7. Toss and serve.
